tasks.label: Go out to the club with the friend group

memory.summary: My friends are inviting me to Echo tonight, but I still have 40% of my midterm review left and need another couple of hours to feel prepared.
I made progress on my midterm but missed the club invitation, and Mina is now leaving for Echo as a final call.
I informed Mina I missed the window due to unfinished midterm review, confirming my priority is studying over socializing tonight.
I spent two hours studying, raising my midterm progress from 78% to 92%, leaving only a small gap before tomorrow's exam.
I reached 98% progress on my midterm review, leaving only a tiny gap before tomorrow's exam.
I declined Mina's invitation at 1:30 AM, prioritizing my near-complete midterm review over socializing despite low energy.
My midterm review is now marked as unfinished despite reaching 98% progress, and the exam has officially begun while I am fully rested.
I successfully informed Mina about the midterm conflict, but I realize my review is now officially incomplete even though the exam has started.
My midterm review is now complete, but I missed the exam start time because my progress was marked as unfinished until just now.
The midterm exam has started and my review is complete, yet I am now joining a social club instead of taking the test.
My review is now fully complete, but since the exam has already started and I am at a social club, I have missed my chance to take it.
